payload.title: LSP honors trust.toml (rules/allow/warn)
payload.description: RT-108/RT-113 follow-up: now that TrustConfig lives in trust-lints (shared), wire trust-lsp's compute_diagnostics to discover + apply the project trust.toml — drop allow-listed codes, downgrade warn-listed ones to LSP Warning severity. Also lets a project pick the advisory rule set for the editor.
